Function signature: def find_platform(arr, dep, n):
target_code:
def find_platform(arr, dep, n): 
    arr.sort() 
    dep.sort() 
    plat_needed = 1
    result = 1
    i = 1
    j = 0
    while (i < n and j < n): 
        if (arr[i] <= dep[j]):           
            plat_needed+= 1
            i+= 1
